scripts.format: node scripts/remove-duplicate-side-effect-imports.mjs frontend/src && npm run lint:fix --prefix ./frontend -- . && npm run format --prefix ./backend && biome check --write .
scripts.format:check: biome check . && npm run lint --prefix ./frontend && npm run format:check --prefix ./backend
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix ./frontend && npm run test --prefix ./backend
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix ./frontend && npm run build --prefix ./backend
